subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ2.25
question_html:
Which of the following can be both formed from bromoethane and converted directly into ethanal?

CH3CH2Br → X
X → CH3CHO

A. CH3CH2OH

B. CH3OCH3

C. CH3COOH

D. H2C=CHBr
examiners_html: The question involving a sequence of organic reactions discriminated well between high scoring and low scoring candidates. 68 % chose the correct compound.
